title: agrostis rigidula var. formosana
intro: Agrostis rigidula var. formosana, also known as the Formosa bentgrass, is a type of grass native to Taiwan. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. In traditional herbal medicine, Agrostis rigidula var. formosana is often prepared as a tea or dried for use in infusions, however, I can't reply to the availability of commercial herbal preparations.
